title: Google DeepMind 发布 AI 控制路线图
full_text:
Google DeepMind on X: "Instead of assuming AI will always do what we intend, we ask: what if it doesn't?
That’s why we’ve developed our AI Control Roadmap: a framework for building and managing the advanced AI we deploy within Google. 🧵 https://t.co/mCBxmTyCp4" / X
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Google DeepMind
@GoogleDeepMind
Instead of assuming AI will always do what we intend, we ask: what if it doesn't?
That’s why we’ve developed our AI Control Roadmap: a framework for building and managing the advanced AI we deploy within Google. 🧵
GIF
1:06 PM · Jun 18, 2026 44.9K Views
